name: Omnivoice
description: Local TTS via omnivoice.cpp — voice cloning, voice design, emotion-aware synthesis, and singing.

OMNIVOICE_LIB_PATH.label: libomnivoice path
OMNIVOICE_LIB_PATH.help: Absolute path to libomnivoice.{so,dylib,dll}. Built via packages/inference/build-omnivoice.mjs.

OMNIVOICE_MODEL_PATH.label: Base LM GGUF
OMNIVOICE_MODEL_PATH.help: Path to the omnivoice base LM GGUF (e.g. omnivoice-base-Q8_0.gguf from huggingface.co/Serveurperso/OmniVoice-GGUF).

OMNIVOICE_CODEC_PATH.label: Tokenizer GGUF
OMNIVOICE_CODEC_PATH.help: Path to the omnivoice tokenizer/codec GGUF (e.g. omnivoice-tokenizer-Q8_0.gguf).

OMNIVOICE_SINGING_MODEL_PATH.label: Singing model GGUF
OMNIVOICE_SINGING_MODEL_PATH.help: Optional ModelsLab/omnivoice-singing GGUF for the singing codepath.

OMNIVOICE_INSTRUCT.label: Default instruct string
OMNIVOICE_INSTRUCT.help: Voice-design instruct, e.g. "female young adult moderate happy".

OMNIVOICE_USE_FA.label: Flash attention
OMNIVOICE_USE_FA.help: Enable flash attention for the GPU backend.
